gazette: TR Ministry of Commerce Information and Notification Center for Technical Barriers in Trade
title: Restriction on Exports of Poultry Meat and Products to the People's Republic of China
bodyHtml:
According to the official announcement of the General Administration of Customs of the People's Republic of China dated February 17, 2023; In order to prevent the spread of bird flu cases, it is reported that the import of "poultry meat and products" originating from Peru, Bolivia and Türkiye to the PRC is prohibited as of the date of the announcement.

All poultry and related products from Peru, Bolivia and Turkiye that are shipped from the date of the announcement will be returned or destroyed. Relevant poultry products from Peru, Bolivia and Turkiye departing before the release date of the announcement will be strictly quarantined and tested, and can only be released after passing the quarantine inspection and laboratory testing.

Click here for the text of the announcement.
